hintText: When making the claim, {{claimantName}} had to say the date they gave the defendant notice (the date of service).
listItem1: They served the defendant with a notice seeking possession on {{noticeDate}}
question: When did the defendant receive notice from {{claimantName}} (optional)?

date.notRealDate: The date the defendant received notice must be a real date
date.futureDate: The date the defendant received notice must either be today’s date or in the past
date.invalidValue: The date the defendant received notice must be a real date
date.missingOne: The date the defendant received notice must include a {{missingField}}
date.missingTwo: The date defendant received notice must include a {{first}} and {{second}}
